issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios such as network failures or loader errors beyond 404.

scenarios.name: Users list page with validated search params (page, search, role) in URL
scenarios.rationale: Baseline falls back to React Router's useSearchParams with untyped string parsing; treatment uses validateSearch with a Zod schema using .catch() defaults, loaderDeps to gate refetching, and Route.useSearch + Route.useNavigate for URL-driven state.

scenarios.name: Dynamic /users/$userId route with typed loader, notFound and typed Link
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses useEffect plus local notFound state; treatment uses createFileRoute('/users/$userId'), throws notFound() in the loader, defines notFoundComponent, and uses a typed <Link to="/users/$userId" params={{ userId }} />.
